findings.title: Public Studio choice acceptance is not atomic or idempotent
findings.impact: A duplicate click, tab race, crash, or reload can duplicate or partially persist正文、版本、分支、任務、成就與數值。
findings.requiredFix: Move acceptance to one authoritative repository transaction with requestId replay protection and revision checks.

findings.title: Formal repository and backup omit accepted choices and story branches
findings.impact: A formal round-trip cannot preserve all consumer story state even though domain types exist.
findings.requiredFix: Add versioned acceptedChoices and storyBranches stores, migration, transaction participation, and round-trip verification.

findings.title: Production health overstates IndexedDB backup and restore readiness
findings.impact: Operators can promote a release based on contradictory readiness data; the same response reports ready while the capability matrix reports backup/restore unsupported.
findings.requiredFix: Derive readiness from one capability source and report the public Studio localStorage/formal IndexedDB split as partial until closed.

findings.title: Rollback compatibility is documented but not executable or browser-verified
findings.impact: The previous build may ignore new records but no safe read-only guard proves it cannot overwrite newer reader data.
findings.requiredFix: Add unknown-schema refusal/read-only behavior and run downgrade/upgrade browser fixtures.

findings.title: Error recovery has no emergency export action
findings.impact: A consumer encountering a route failure receives recovery text but cannot export data from the error surface.
findings.requiredFix: Expose a safe local emergency export from project route error boundaries.

findings.title: Long-novel performance remains partial
findings.impact: The 100k/300k/500k load and interaction envelopes are not independently proven.
findings.requiredFix: Complete the permitted partial performance matrix before advertising large-novel readiness.

findings.title: Checked-in release manifest still contains pending placeholders
findings.impact: Repository evidence does not exactly match the deployed release.
findings.requiredFix: Stamp immutable post-deploy evidence without mutating runtime status.
